name: Fairfax India Holdings
confidenceReason: Trading at a steep discount to NAV, Anchorage Infrastructure IPO catalyst.
bullCase: A highly discounted vehicle for elite capital allocation in the world's fastest-growing major economy. The impending IPO of Anchorage Infrastructure (Bangalore Airport) is a massive near-term catalyst that will crystallize intrinsic value and narrow the steep NAV discount.
bearCase: Significant emerging market FX risk (Rupee depreciation) and illiquidity in its sum-of-the-parts portfolio. Unlocking value relies heavily on specific exit events rather than recurring distributions.
